name: jesus-loop
description: Jesus Take The Wheel — a 7-step Genesis-days loop that builds your thing while citing scripture at every step. Each step injects its structural verse (Genesis day) + a tactical parallel, both KJV-quoted, and requires an element-by-element mapping to the current work state. Optional harness-break escapes any stuck step into a full fib-harness child cycle. Validated (verse, applied-lesson) pairs append to your own Cloudflare D1 via an immutability-enforced Worker.
